I have enough information from the searches. Here's a concise factual summary:

---

**Europa Universalis V — Autosave & Save Info**

**Autosave frequency (singleplayer)**
By default, EU5 autosaves every 6 months of in-game time. Players report it can also be set to yearly, quarterly (3 months), or monthly — this is configurable in the game setup menu before starting a session, not from within an ongoing game. As of patch 1.02, some players have noted the setting is harder to locate in the UI.

...(truncated)
